message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate dict, set, and struct patterns to emitCallCtx

- comp_dict.zig: runtime.toPyValue pattern
- set.zig: SetOps remove/discard/pop with nested @TypeOf calls
- struct_mod.zig: @floatCast and runtime.packInt/toFloat patterns

Uses nested emitCallCtx for complex multi-level function calls.
